node.text: Smart Training Integration: Connect with the Flickit app to track performance, monitor drills, and receive personalized feedback for skill improvement
Match-Ready Quality: Built for training sessions, competitive matches, and casual play with pro-level durability.
32-Panel PU Build: Reinforced stitching ensures consistent bounce and long-lasting performance
All-Surface Play: Performs seamlessly on grass, turf, and hard ground
Enhanced Control: Textured grip with a bold multicolor design for better visibility and ball control
Size Options: Available in sizes 3, 4, and 5.

Does it come with an app?

node.text: Foosball Table For Kids & Adults | Shopster

node.content-desc: Customer reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 118 global ratings

node.text: Customers find the football well-made and durable, with one noting it can handle tough plays. They appreciate its training capabilities, with one customer highlighting how it helps children practice drills at home, and another mentioning how it combines learning with play. The product is easy to use with clear instructions, and customers consider it worth the price. They like the app integration and find it engaging, with one noting how the AI videos make learning football more fun.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews

node.content-desc: Positive aspect, value for money, 10 mentions
Positive aspect, ease of use, 5 mentions

node.text: This football is amazing it's not that hard best for intermidiate practice ball. This has an app which helps us learn skills fast. Highly recommend

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Awesome product with a more than friendly app

As a parent, I’m extremely happy with Flick It Football. The coaching is structured, professional, and focused on real skill development — and I’ve seen clear improvement in my child’s confidence and game understanding. The app is a big plus. It helps my child practice...

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Nice ball for kids, but expensive

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Good product it's like big brand products

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Very bad quality it got punctured within a day of playing with it. Do not recommend for kids. Waste of money.

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Nice Quality and colour but it blindly
Very good quality ball my son enjoys playing with it.

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Very nice and authentic colour and nice football especially for indoor training.

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: The app is easy to use. I haven't used all the features yet, but it seems like a really good way to track progress
